title: Sinch Contact
description: Schema representing a contact in the Sinch Conversation API. A contact groups together underlying connected channel recipient identities, enabling omnichannel communication with a single person across SMS, WhatsApp, Messenger, and other channels.

id.description: The unique contact identifier assigned by the platform

display_name.description: The display name of the contact

external_id.description: An external identifier for cross-referencing with other systems

language.description: The preferred language of the contact in BCP 47 format

metadata.description: Custom metadata associated with the contact

channel_identities.description: The channel identities for reaching the contact on various channels

channel_priority.description: Preferred channel order for reaching the contact

ChannelIdentity.description: A channel-specific identity for reaching the contact

identity.description: The channel-specific identity such as phone number or user ID

app_id.description: The Conversation API app ID associated with this channel identity
